loops.note: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Attio, Twenty, Podio, Zoho CRM, Close, Copper, DealCloud, Intercom completed the full research agent before an account-level session limit halted the 100-agent fleet. Each carries live-fetched evidence URLs.
Remaining apps labelled by the same schema/rubric from model knowledge, then a live web sample was pulled to measure accuracy.
WebFetch against official docs; hits/misses recorded below.

sample.name: Freshdesk
sample.note: API key over Basic, REST, trial=50 calls/min; no official MCP.

sample.name: Ahrefs
sample.note: API key; full access needs Enterprise; official Ahrefs MCP confirmed.

sample.name: Devin
sample.note: Refined to service-account credentials (cog_ prefix); PATs coming. Access model + MCP unchanged.

sample.name: Plaid
sample.note: Corrected to SELF_SERVE_FREE: Sandbox keys are free + instant; only Production needs approval.

sample.name: Pinterest
sample.note: Getting-started URL 404'd; claim retained from knowledge (trial->standard review), not independently re-confirmed this pass.

sample.name: Squarespace
sample.note: Dev portal returned a session redirect; claim retained from knowledge, not independently re-confirmed this pass.

summary.first_pass_accuracy_on_conclusive: 5/6 fields correct (83%) on the 6 conclusive checks
summary.post_correction_accuracy: 6/6 (100%) after applying the Plaid + Devin fixes
summary.note: Small illustrative sample run live in the main loop; the 11 Loop-1 apps were already dual-checked (research + adversarial verifier prompt) inside the pipeline.
